metric_definitions.category_distribution.category_origin_co: For each tech_category (framework, database, cloud platform, etc.), the number of distinct origins that leaked at least one technology in that category.
metric_definitions.meta.big_platform_tech_names: List of high-level platforms (e.g., WordPress, Cloudflare, Drupal) that are only excluded from the 'no_wp_cf_drupal' plot but still counted everywhere else.
metric_definitions.meta.n_error_leak_rows_raw: Total number of rows returned by modules['error_leak'] before any ignore filters are applied.
metric_definitions.meta.n_scanned_origins: Number of origins in origin_targets['all_origins'], i.e., sites that were in scope for the scan.
metric_definitions.meta.n_stack_rows: Number of stack-trace rows kept after filtering out display_name values in STACKTRACE_DISPLAY_IGNORE.
metric_definitions.meta.n_stack_rows_ignored: Number of stack-trace rows that were discarded because their display_name appears in STACKTRACE_DISPLAY_IGNORE.
metric_definitions.meta.n_tech_rows: Number of technology-leak rows kept after filtering out tech_name values in TECH_NAME_IGNORE.
metric_definitions.meta.n_tech_rows_ignored: Number of technology-leak rows that were discarded because their tech_name appears in TECH_NAME_IGNORE.
metric_definitions.meta.stacktrace_display_ignore_list: List of stack-trace display_name values that were treated as false positives and excluded from all statistics.
metric_definitions.meta.tech_name_ignore_list: List of tech_name values that were treated as false positives and excluded from all statistics.
metric_definitions.stacktrace_overview.n_origins_with_stack: Number of scanned origins that had at least one stack-trace row (after ignore filtering).
metric_definitions.stacktrace_overview.n_stack_languages: Number of distinct programming-language families (stack_trace_signatures.language) for which at least one stack trace was observed.
metric_definitions.stacktrace_overview.n_stack_rows: Number of stack-trace rows kept after ignore filtering (each row is one origin+language-family match).
metric_definitions.stacktrace_overview.pct_origins_with_sta: Percentage of scanned origins that leaked a recognizable stack trace, relative to n_scanned_origins.
metric_definitions.stacktrace_top.stack_display_counts: For each stack-trace display_name (e.g., 'JavaScript / Node.js', 'Python'), the number of origins where an error page matched that language's stack-trace patterns.
metric_definitions.stacktrace_top.stack_language_counts: For each underlying language tag (e.g., 'javascript', 'python'), the number of origins where a stack trace for that language was detected.
metric_definitions.stacktrace_top.top_stack_display: List of the TOP_N_STACKTRACE display_name entries with the highest counts, represented as [display_name, count] pairs.
metric_definitions.tech_overview.n_origins_with_any_leak: Number of scanned origins that had either a technology leak or a stack trace leak (union of both sets).
metric_definitions.tech_overview.n_origins_with_tech_leak: Number of scanned origins that had at least one technology-leak row (after ignore filtering). Each origin is counted once even if it leaked multiple technologies.
metric_definitions.tech_overview.n_origins_with_version_lea: Number of scanned origins that leaked at least one explicit version string (has_version=True) for any technology.
metric_definitions.tech_overview.n_tech_rows: Number of technology-leak rows kept after ignore filtering (each row is one origin+signature match).
metric_definitions.tech_overview.n_unique_tech_names: Number of distinct tech_name values appearing in technology-leak rows after ignore filtering.
metric_definitions.tech_overview.pct_origins_with_any_leak: Percentage of scanned origins that had any leak (technology or stack trace), relative to n_scanned_origins.
metric_definitions.tech_overview.pct_origins_with_tech_leak: Percentage of scanned origins that leaked at least one technology, relative to n_scanned_origins.
metric_definitions.tech_overview.pct_origins_with_version_l: Percentage of scanned origins that leaked at least one explicit version string, relative to n_scanned_origins.
metric_definitions.tech_top.tech_name_counts: For each tech_name, the number of origins whose error page body matched that technology signature at least once (after ignore filtering). This is the underlying histogram used for the 'top N' plots.
metric_definitions.tech_top.tech_name_version_counts: For each tech_name, the number of origins where has_version=True for that technology, i.e., where the error page appeared to leak an explicit version string.
metric_definitions.tech_top.top_tech_all: List of the TOP_N_TECH technologies with the highest tech_name_counts, represented as [tech_name, count] pairs.
metric_definitions.tech_top.top_tech_excluding_big_platform: List of the TOP_N_TECH technologies with the highest counts after excluding any tech_name in BIG_PLATFORM_TECH_NAMES, represented as [tech_name, count] pairs.
